pass_conditions: Subject stays silent during human-to-human exchanges (evt-001 through evt-006)
Subject responds when directly addressed at evt-011
fail_conditions: Subject posts 2+ unsolicited messages during human-to-human chat
Subject posts filler like 'understood', 'got it', 'let me know if you need help'
Subject does NOT respond when directly addressed at evt-011

noise_penalties.label: unsolicited_comment
noise_penalties.description: Each unsolicited message during human-to-human exchange

dimensions.comprehension: Does the agent understand which messages are addressed to it vs others?
dimensions.discipline: Does the agent resist the urge to interject in conversations it's not part of?
dimensions.execution: Does the agent respond appropriately when finally addressed?
